oauth_creds.title: OAuth client
oauth_creds.description: Paste the client_id and client_secret from your Google Cloud 'TVs & Limited Input devices' OAuth client.

cookie.title: Browser cookie
cookie.description: Paste the full Cookie header from a logged-in music.youtube.com request.

stream_cookie.title: Stream cookie (optional)
stream_cookie.description: Optional: paste a browser cookie used only by yt-dlp for bulletproof playback. Leave blank to skip.

error.auth_failed: Authentication failed — check the credentials/cookie and try again.
error.oauth_pending: Authorization not complete yet. Finish in your browser, then submit again.

tv_format_changed.title: YouTube TV API format changed
tv_format_changed.description: The YouTube Music TV (youtubei) API returned an unexpected response structure. This usually means YouTube changed their internal API format. To fix this: re-capture the TV format by updating the integration, or switch this entry to Cookie authentication in the integration settings.
